en: I recently graduated from Northwestern University. What are you doing here?
ko: 최근 노스웨스턴 대학교를 졸업했습니다. 그래서 여기는 왜 왔죠?

en: I think I could do a good job as your assistant and I came to New York to be a journalist
and sent letters out everywhere and finally got a call from Elias Clark and met with Sherry
up at Human Resources and basically it's this, our auto-universe.
So you don't read Runway? No.
ko: 기본적으로 여기 아니면 오토 유니버스예요. 그래서 런웨이를 안 읽어요?

en: And before today, you had never heard of me? No.
ko: 그리고 오늘 전까지 저에 대해 들어본 적도 없었고요?

en: And you have no style or sense of fashion?
ko: 스타일이나 패션 감각이 전혀 없군요. 글쎄요, 음...

en: Well, I think that depends on what you're...
ko: 글쎄요, 그건 뭐에 따라 다르다고 생각하는데...

en: I was editor-in-chief of the Daily Northwestern.
I also won a national competition for a college journalist with my series on the janitor's
ko: 청소부 노조에 대한 시리즈로 대학 기자 전국 대회에서 우승도 했는데, 착취를 폭로한...
